channel.title: International Journal of Chemical Reactor Engineering
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in International Journal of Chemical Reactor Engineering

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Rida Khalid, Muhammad Imran Din, Zaib Hussain, Sania Rehman, Tajamal Hussain, Sadia Ata, Samia Yousaf, Aneeqa Parveen, Zirwa Tuz Zahra, Shahbaz Ahmad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijcre-2024-frontmatter10

item.title: Toxicological assessment of reactive blue 19 dye aqueous solutions under UV-LED light
item.description: Article by Rida Khalid, Muhammad Imran Din, Zaib Hussain, Sania Rehman, Tajamal Hussain, Sadia Ata, Samia Yousaf, Aneeqa Parveen, Zirwa Tuz Zahra, Shahbaz Ahmad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijcre-2024-0147

item.title: Enhanced degradation of malachite green through heterogeneous processes using an iron oxide catalyst
item.description: Article by Rida Khalid, Muhammad Imran Din, Zaib Hussain, Sania Rehman, Tajamal Hussain, Sadia Ata, Samia Yousaf, Aneeqa Parveen, Zirwa Tuz Zahra, Shahbaz Ahmad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijcre-2024-0190

item.title: Optimization design of a two-step microreactor with spiral structure for high-performance catalytic reactions
item.description: Article by Rida Khalid, Muhammad Imran Din, Zaib Hussain, Sania Rehman, Tajamal Hussain, Sadia Ata, Samia Yousaf, Aneeqa Parveen, Zirwa Tuz Zahra, Shahbaz Ahmad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijcre-2024-0175

item.title: Kinetics of manganese removal from groundwater via biological activated carbon fiber
item.description: Article by Rida Khalid, Muhammad Imran Din, Zaib Hussain, Sania Rehman, Tajamal Hussain, Sadia Ata, Samia Yousaf, Aneeqa Parveen, Zirwa Tuz Zahra, Shahbaz Ahmad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijcre-2024-0062

item.title: Study of temperature dynamics and influencing factors during composting process
item.description: Article by Rida Khalid, Muhammad Imran Din, Zaib Hussain, Sania Rehman, Tajamal Hussain, Sadia Ata, Samia Yousaf, Aneeqa Parveen, Zirwa Tuz Zahra, Shahbaz Ahmad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijcre-2024-0133

item.title: Nonlocal modeling of continuously stirred tank reactors with residence time distribution
item.description: Article by Rida Khalid, Muhammad Imran Din, Zaib Hussain, Sania Rehman, Tajamal Hussain, Sadia Ata, Samia Yousaf, Aneeqa Parveen, Zirwa Tuz Zahra, Shahbaz Ahmad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijcre-2024-0154

item.title: Enhanced tribological performance of transesterified corn oil biodiesel blends with CuO and TiO2 nanoparticles: experimental analysis on wear and friction reduction using environment friendly lubricants
item.description: Article by Rida Khalid, Muhammad Imran Din, Zaib Hussain, Sania Rehman, Tajamal Hussain, Sadia Ata, Samia Yousaf, Aneeqa Parveen, Zirwa Tuz Zahra, Shahbaz Ahmad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijcre-2024-0156

item.title: Maximum sensitivity constrained modified Smith predictor for delayed integrating type stirred tank reactors model
item.description: Article by Rida Khalid, Muhammad Imran Din, Zaib Hussain, Sania Rehman, Tajamal Hussain, Sadia Ata, Samia Yousaf, Aneeqa Parveen, Zirwa Tuz Zahra, Shahbaz Ahmad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijcre-2024-0122

item.title: Effect of ion exchange resin membranes and activated carbon electrodes in water desalination using capacitive deionization technique with saline streams
item.description: Article by Rida Khalid, Muhammad Imran Din, Zaib Hussain, Sania Rehman, Tajamal Hussain, Sadia Ata, Samia Yousaf, Aneeqa Parveen, Zirwa Tuz Zahra, Shahbaz Ahmad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijcre-2024-0197

item.title: Kinetic and thermodynamic study of maize stalk biomass using thermogravimetric analysis
item.description: Article by Rida Khalid, Muhammad Imran Din, Zaib Hussain, Sania Rehman, Tajamal Hussain, Sadia Ata, Samia Yousaf, Aneeqa Parveen, Zirwa Tuz Zahra, Shahbaz Ahmad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijcre-2024-0100
